meaning: adj.放肆无礼的,,厚颜无耻的
examples: Here Tink, who was in her bedroom, eavesdropping, squeaked out something impudent.
Some of them spoke pleasantly and were well behaved, while others were impudent and insulting.
An impudent chip from Angel di Maria rounded off the Real scoring on an eventful night.
Nick Naylor (Aaron Eckhart), the chief spokesman for the tobacco lobby in Washington, is handsome and likable, a mixture of swagger and impudent candor.
